entries.title: Mean, Median, Mode
entries.content: Mean: average. Median: middle value (robust to outliers). Mode: most frequent value.

entries.title: Correlation vs Causation
entries.content: Correlation means variables move together; causation means one drives the other. Correlation alone does not prove cause.

entries.title: Train/Test Split
entries.content: Split data: train model on training set, evaluate on unseen test set. Prevents overfitting to memorized data.

entries.title: Pandas DataFrame
entries.content: Python library for tabular data: rows and columns, filtering, grouping, merging. Core tool in data analysis.

entries.title: Overfitting
entries.content: Model memorizes training noise and fails on new data. Fix with more data, regularization, simpler models, or cross-validation.
